Privacy Notice
Join Us In The Lounge For
$35 Per Pairing
|
Now — April 19
Make A Reservation
Three
Wagyu Burgers.
Four Dave Phinney Reds.
Let The
Pairings Commence.
Our most anticipated
lounge event has
returned. This Spring, we invite you to pair a gourmet Wagyu burger with a glass of
exceptional wine from renowned winemaker Dave Phinney. Enjoy our suggested pairing or pair as
you like.
$35 Per Pairing
|
Now
— April 19
Lounge reservations accepted
for this
special event
Make a reservation
Wagyu Burgers
served with Sea Salt Fries
The Grille's Wagyu Cheeseburger
with Grilled Onions, Steak Sauce and Vermont White
Cheddar

Pairing:
Orin Swift Advice from John, Merlot
Wagyu Blue Cheese and Black Truffle Burger
with Cabernet-Braised Red Onions
Suggested
Pairing:

Wagyu Mushroom and Swiss Burger
with Sautéed Shiitake and Cremini Mushrooms,
Jarlsberg
Cheese and Truffle Aioli

Pairings:

Acolytes by OLG, Pinot Noir
Chips & Caviar

served with Housemade Chips

Dave Phinney
Portfolio
Wines
Orin Swift Palermo,
Cabernet Sauvignon
This bold and quintessential Napa
Valley
Cabernet Sauvignon comprised of 16 growing areas is just as powerful as the image on the bottle
of the mummified priest in Palermo, Sicily.
Tasting
Notes:

meta.meta_description: The Capital Grille is a fine dining restaurant & steakhouse. We use only the freshest ingredients for our artfully prepared dishes.
